data.title: BitMart will launch Dark Eclipse (DARK)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart will launch Dark Eclipse (DARK) for the first time at 19:00 (Eastern Time) on April 11, and will open the DARK/USDT trading pair.
DARK is an experimental network of a trusted execution environment (TEE) that powers the infinitely scalable MCP world.

data.title: BitMart will list Stratis (STRAX)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Stratis (STRAX) at 18:00 (Eastern Time) on April 11, and the STRAX/USDT trading pair will be launched.
Stratis (STRAX) is a blockchain-as-a-service (BaaS) platform that aims to provide enterprises with a variety of products and services, such as launching private side chains, running full nodes, developing and deploying smart contracts, initial coin offering (ICO) platforms, and identity verification applications. It also provides cryptocurrency wallets and blockchain consulting services.

data.title: Curve founder: once again extend the lock-up period of veCRV held to 4 years
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Curve founder Michael Egorov said on X that he has extended the lock-up period of veCRV to 4 years again, and publicly extended the specific transaction records of the lock-up.
Previous news, affected by the official abolition of the IRS DeFi broker rules, CRV briefly broke through 0.6 USDT.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 82,000 USDT with a 0.34% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 11, 2025, 09:28 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 82,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 82,068.34375 USDT, with a narrowed 0.34% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: European stocks extended losses, with Germany's DAX down 2%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: European stocks opened high and fell, with the German DAX index falling by 2%, the Italian FTSE MIB index falling by 1.8%, the European Stoxx 50 index falling by 1.7%, the French CAC40 index falling by 1.6%, and the British FTSE 100 index falling by 0.5%. (Jinshi)

data.title: BitMart has launched BABY perpetual contract with a maximum leverage of 50 times
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart has launched Babylon (BABY) perpetual contract at 17:00 (UTC+8) on April 11, 2025. At that time, the BABY/USDT trading pair will be opened with a maximum leverage of 50 times.
The Babylon Bitcoin Staking Protocol connects the Bitcoin Security Network with Bitcoin holders, giving you direct access to the largest and most powerful community in the cryptocurrency field.

data.title: Canary Capital's Litecoin ETF Moves Closer to Launch with DTCC Listing
data.description:
According to PANews, Canary Capital's Litecoin ETF has been added to the list of ETFs by the U.S. Depository Trust and Clearing Corporation (DTCC). The ETF, identified by the code LTCC, appeared on the DTCC's official website on Thursday evening. While the ETF still awaits regulatory approval from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), its inclusion in the DTCC list marks a preparatory step towards a potential launch.

Eric Balchunas, Bloomberg's chief ETF analyst, noted that being listed does not imply approval or readiness for trading, but it does indicate that the issuer is preparing for approval. Canary's Litecoin spot ETF has a 90% chance of receiving approval. If approved, Litecoin would become the third cryptocurrency to serve as the underlying asset for a spot ETF, following Bitcoin and Ethereum.

data.title: Moody's chief economist: inflation data will be "very ugly" by this summer
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: "I expect inflation data to be ugly by May - then June and July," said Mark Zandi, chief economist at Moody's. 
Given Trump's tariff agenda and the resulting trade war, consumer prices are expected to rise significantly this summer. 
In addition, Capital Economics expects the consumer price index (CPI) to peak at about 4% in 2025, up from 2.4% in March. This peak is roughly twice the Fed's long-term target. (Jinshi)
